body:
Don't laugh.I never visit physics....however .she mentions the FLA police, which means PB police...

My friend Jeanne Donelley will be in NY next Monday and Tuesday Jan 14 and 15. She is a psychic who advises top Washington lobbyists, the Florida police, and high profile individuals.  She is amazing! I told her I would pass her information around to my friends (she said to mention that you are a friend of mine and she will do her best to accommodate scheduling etc.)
 
If you are nosey like me and want to meet her here are her details:
 
Jeanne Donelley
(941) 794 8456
she charges $300 per hour.
